Class EjercicioDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Represents a single exercise entry within a RutinaDTO.

public class EjercicioDTO
Inheritance
object
EjercicioDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Exercises are scoped to a specific day of the week and ordered within that day via Orden. Id is auto-assigned on construction.

Constructors

EjercicioDTO() 

public EjercicioDTO()

Properties

DiaSemana

Day of the week this exercise is scheduled for (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday).

public int DiaSemana { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Id

Primary key, auto-assigned on construction.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Nombre

Exercise name or description.

public string Nombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Orden

Display order within the day's exercise list (ascending).

public int Orden { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Repeticiones

Number of repetitions to perform.

public int Repeticiones { get; set; }

Property Value

int

RutinaID

FK to the parent routine.

public Guid RutinaID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid
